def positive_expensive_work_starts_before_input_validation():
    rule_id = "expensive_work_starts_before_input_validation"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag functions that begin heavy computation or I/O before validating cheap preconditions."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
